text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week places first in her<n>exhibition race. I
go to watch her<n>concert and find...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Spe. That was such<n>an intense
race today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Suzuka! I'm so sorry, I'm<n>just too in my
head right now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, because of your concert, huh?<n>Then, let me
tell you something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka takes Special Week's<n>hands and
whispers something into<n>her ear.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When you're standing on stage, try<n>looking at
each of the audience<n>members' faces.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Each of them?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're up. Good luck out there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! There are so many people! All<n>looking at
me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The song's starting! I better hurry<n>and get on
stage!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My legs... won't move. Why?!<n>Come on,
legs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do I do, Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Try looking at each and every one of<n>the
audience members' faces.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Each and every one of their faces...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Spe! You were incredible today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe, I love youuuu!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I can hear them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They're all here for me. They're all<n>cheering me
on.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so... happy. I have to do<n>something. I have to
let them know<n>how grateful I am.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I just need to be brave!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week jumps onstage and<n>begins to
dance her heart out!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though her steps are a bit awkward<n>at times,
they convey her<n>wholehearted passion.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No, thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just at that moment, however, Special<n>Week
stumbles on a step and trips!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's our Spe, all right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe! Please keep racing forever!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's concert ends with<n>thunderous
applause.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The audience looked thrilled. That<n>was a great
performance.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I think I get it now, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Concerts are where I can express my<n>gratitude
to my fans.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I wanted to be Japan's top<n>racer for
my mom...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But now I want to do it for all the fans<n>who cheer
me on too!
